## Problem or motivation

Describe the problem you are trying to solve, or the use case that motivates this request.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have already tried or considered.

## Additional context

Add mockups, diagrams, links to related issues, or any other context here.
